title: 12 missiles launched
title_en: 12 missiles launched
title_uk: Випущено 12 ракет
description: 😱Moscow air defense is not designed for mass attacks by Ukrainian drones, - aviation expert Kryvolap According to him, Russian propaganda for years created the image of an "impenetrable shield" around the capital, but in practice this is not the case. The Pantsir-S1 complexes, with which Moscow is covered, after the launch of 12 missiles overheated and were forced to cool down for about half an hour, Kryvolap notes. At this moment the following...
description_en: 😱Moscow air defense is not designed for mass attacks by Ukrainian drones, - aviation expert Kryvolap According to him, Russian propaganda for years created the image of an "impenetrable shield" around the capital, but in practice this is not the case. The Pantsir-S1 complexes, with which Moscow is covered, after the launch of 12 missiles overheated and were forced to cool down for about half an hour, Kryvolap notes. At this moment the following...
description_uk: 😱Московская ПВО не рассчитана на массовые атаки украинских дронов, — авиаэксперт Криволап По его словам, российская пропаганда годами создавала образ «непробиваемого щита» вокруг столицы, однако на практике это не так. Комплексы «Панцирь-С1», которыми прикрыта москва, после запуска 12 ракет перегреваются и вынуждены около получаса охлаждаться, отмечает Криволап. В этот момент следующие...

title: Dad is all about protection and safety. And today it has acquired an...
title_en: Dad is all about protection and safety. And today it has acquired an...

description: Dad is all about protection and safety. And today it has acquired an even deeper meaning, because Ukrainian parents protect not only their children, but also the very possibility of a safe future. Being a dad in Ukraine today is a special courage and a special love. We thank all Ukrainian dads for their care and strength. To everyone who defends Ukraine, who every day does everything possible for the sake of family and children. To those who teach, inspire and...
description_en: Dad is all about protection and safety. And today it has acquired an even deeper meaning, because Ukrainian parents protect not only their children, but also the very possibility of a safe future. Being a dad in Ukraine today is a special courage and a special love. We thank all Ukrainian dads for their care and strength. To everyone who defends Ukraine, who every day does everything possible for the sake of family and children. To those who teach, inspire and...
description_uk: Тато – це про захист і безпеку. І сьогодні це набуло ще глибшого змісту, бо українські батьки захищають не лише своїх дітей, а й саму можливість безпечного майбутнього. Бути татом в Україні сьогодні – це особлива мужність і особлива любов. Дякуємо всім українським татам за турботу і силу. Всім, хто обороняє Україну, хто щодня робить усе можливе заради родини і дітей. Тим, хто навчає, надихає і...

title: Dear defenders! Happy Father's Day. Being a father is a...
title_en: Dear defenders! Happy Father's Day. Being a father is a...
title_uk: Шановні захисники! Щасливого дня батька. Бути батьком - це...
description: Dear defenders! Happy Father's Day. Being a father is a responsibility to the future. Today, thousands of Ukrainian fathers meet this day with weapons in their hands. They fight on the front lines to protect their families and their home. In this war, the Ukrainian father is not just the head of the family, he is a shield that stands between the enemy and his children. Parenthood today is measured, among other things, by the number of...
description_en: Dear defenders! Happy Father's Day. Being a father is a responsibility to the future. Today, thousands of Ukrainian fathers meet this day with weapons in their hands. They fight on the front lines to protect their families and their home. In this war, the Ukrainian father is not just the head of the family, he is a shield that stands between the enemy and his children. Parenthood today is measured, among other things, by the number of...
description_uk: Дорогі захисники! Вітаю з Днем батька. Бути батьком — це відповідальність перед майбутнім. Сьогодні тисячі українських тат зустрічають цей день зі зброєю в руках. Вони воюють на передовій, щоб захистити свої родини та свій дім. На цій війні український батько — це не просто голова родини, це щит, який стоїть між ворогом і своїми дітьми. Батьківство сьогодні серед іншого вимірюється кількістю...

title: Zaporizhzhia: 5 killed, 10 injured
title_en: Zaporizhzhia: 5 killed, 10 injured
title_uk: Запоріжжя: 5 загиблих, 10 поранених
description: At least 5 dead, 10 injured in Russian bombing in Zaporizhzhia. Russian forces launched nine glide bombs on the regional capital, according to preliminary information, Governor Ivan Fedorov said. One victim's body was recovered from the rubble of a destroyed home. Five people have been killed, and at least 10 injured. Photos: Ivan Fedorov / Telegram
description_en: At least 5 dead, 10 injured in Russian bombing in Zaporizhzhia. Russian forces launched nine glide bombs on the regional capital, according to preliminary information, Governor Ivan Fedorov said. One victim's body was recovered from the rubble of a destroyed home. Five people have been killed, and at least 10 injured. Photos: Ivan Fedorov / Telegram

title: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the...
title_en: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the...
title_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що орден...
description: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_en: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що Орден Білого Орла не є звичайною відзнакою. Це символ найвищої довіри Речі Посполитої. Він означає особливий зв’язок із Польською державою та особливу вдячність народу. Такий символ вимагає не лише заслуг, але й поваги до цінностей, які становлять фундамент нашої спільноти. Отже, якщо вважається, що цей особливий символ може залишатись у Катерини...
